query: SELECT away_team, home_team, model_away_score, model_home_score, model_away_spread, model_home_spread, model_total, model_away_ml, model_home_ml, model_run_at FROM games WHERE game_date = '2026-03-12' AND model_run_at IS NOT NULL ORDER BY model_run_at DESC LIMIT 10;
